appender.server_file.layout.type_name = server
appender.server_file.policies.type = Policies
appender.server_file.policies.time.type = TimeBasedTriggeringPolicy
appender.server_file.policies.time.interval = 1

appender.server_file.policies.size.type = SizeBasedTriggeringPolicy
appender.server_file.policies.size.size = 128MB

rootLogger.appenderRef.server_file.ref = server_file
